name: metal room
hints: Another metal room with a force field. Be cautious - not all force fields are safe to pass through.
The force field here leads to the hydroponics area, but passing through it is deadly unless conditions are right.
DO NOT go through this force field - it causes death. Use the EAST exit instead to continue safely through the tunnels.
notes: Metal room with a deadly force field. Going through the force field leads to room 8 (hydroponics) but kills you. The safe route is EAST through the tunnel system. The force field must be disabled or bypassed through another means.
